Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce updated declare_model with added constraints We must infer activities related to sensitive attributes CheckApplicantAge CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantRace perhaps also attribute values like ApplicantAgeMinority The prompt suggests decision steps of Approve Reject RequestAdditionalInfo ManualReview In the given model we have StartApplication FinalDecision RequestAdditionalInfo

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to add constraints to enforce fairness for example FinalDecision must coexist with ManualReview when sensitive attribute check occurs

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can add generic activities Approve Reject ManualReview CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck Also CheckApplicantAge CheckApplicantGender

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Provide constraints Coexistence If Approve occurs then ManualReview must coexist Similarly for Reject Response After a sensitive attribute check such as CheckApplicantRace we must have a BiasMitigationCheck before any decision Non succession Prevent direct succession from CheckApplicantRace to Approve or Reject

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We need to preserve format For unary constraints map activity to dict with support confidence For binary map source activity to dict mapping target activity to dict

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to add to existing keys we can leave existing as is and add new entries

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Add to existence maybe ManualReview Approve Reject CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Add to coexistence For each decision step Approve Reject require ManualReview so coexistence Approve to ManualReview and Reject to ManualReview

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Add to response CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We want to ensure that decision cannot directly follow attribute check without bias mitigation so we can add nonsuccession CheckApplicantRace not directly followed by Approve or Reject

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For binary constraints map source to target with support confidence fields for nonsuccession as well

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Also maybe add nonchainsuccession to prevent CheckApplicantRace to Approve Reject without BiasMitigationCheck but that is more complex We will keep simple

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus final declare_model keep existing keys unchanged but add new entries
